title: Odysseus + Gemma-4 26B & FREE APIs: RIP Hermes & OpenClaw! THIS IS CRAZY!
summary: Odysseus is a local-first AI workspace enabling self-hosted deployment with local models like Gemma. It includes AI agents with web search and shell access, deep research capabilities, model comparison, and productivity features like notes, calendar, and email integration.
